creator: hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com
text:
> Nice would be two screenshots of your thunar showing one directory with
> librsvg2 installed and one without.

That's quite right.  I attach two screenshots.

withlibrsvg2.png: With librsvg2 installed, Xfce loads svg-loader.so
library dynamically and shows fancy SVG icons.

withoutlibrsvg2.png: After removing svg-loader.so and deleting
~/.thumbnails icon cache, you'll see boring desktop and filemanager
screens.

Thanks.

-- 
Hiroto Kagotani
<hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com>
